task_description: Implement all 110 music app feature suggestions across 11 categories: Music Experience (1-10), Search & Discovery (11-20), Mobile & Touch (21-30), Visual & Animation (31-40), Analytics & Insights (41-50), Organization & Library (51-60), Social & Sharing (61-70), Performance & Technical (71-80), Accessibility (81-90), Fun & Engagement (91-100), and Developer & Meta (101-110).
